SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_MO_COPAY_3M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2007. It will only be populated if the plan has an enhanced benefit design 
with extra coverage in the gap. 

The coverage gap is technically referred to as the initial coverage limit (ICL) for the Part D benefit. 
Plans that use a coinsurance percentage rather than a co-payment amount will not have a value in this 
field; see
